title: Original Painting Recipe
description: While this recipe didn't last long it is the original recipe of one of Minecrafts oldest blocks!
body:
# Original Painting Recipe

This is just a simple recipe data pack, nothing special.

The painting was introduced in Indev 20100223 on 23 Feburary 2010, using 8 planks and 1 wool to be created. Only 4 days later on 27 Feburary 2010, Infdev 20100227-1 was released changing the recipe to the 8 sticks and 1 wool recipe we all know and love!

You will need 8 wooden planks of any variants and 1 wool of any variant to craft a painting!

**Side Note**: The game will most likely tell you that the data pack is out of data depending on the version you are choosing to play but it works just fine 1.13-1.20

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ae0ee9a0cc1e2ab375efbaeb1127a78003f34de.png)
